Examples.Title: Create a cloud storage
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using CVAT;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Update a cloud storage
Examples.Code:
### Update a cloud storage
# @name cloudstorages_partial_update
PATCH {{host}}/api/cloudstorages/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/vnd.cvat+json

{
  "provider_type": "AWS_S3_BUCKET",
  "resource": "somebucket",
  "display_name": "Bucket",
  "credentials_type": "KEY_SECRET_KEY_PAIR",
  "key": "XXX",
  "secret_key": "XXX",
  "specific_attributes": "region=eu-central-1",
  "description": "Some description",
  "manifests": [
    "manifest.jsonl"
  ]
}

## Responses
# 200
# Content-Type: application/vnd.cvat+json

Examples.Title: Create a job
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using CVAT;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Allows updating current validation configuration
Examples.Description:
WARNING: this operation is not protected from race conditions.
It's up to the user to ensure no parallel calls to this operation happen.
It affects image access, including exports with images, backups, chunk downloading etc.
Examples.Code:
### Allows updating current validation configuration
# @name jobs_partial_update_validation_layout
PATCH {{host}}/api/jobs/{{id}}/validation_layout
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/vnd.cvat+json

{
  "frame_selection_method": "manual",
  "honeypot_real_frames": [
    10,
    20,
    22
  ]
}

## Responses
# 200
# Content-Type: application/vnd.cvat+json

Examples.Title: Create a job validation request
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using CVAT;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Update a task
Allows updating current validation configuration
Examples.Description:
WARNING: this operation is not protected from race conditions.
It's up to the user to ensure no parallel calls to this operation happen.
It affects image access, including exports with images, backups, chunk downloading etc.
Examples.Code:
### Allows updating current validation configuration
# @name tasks_partial_update_validation_layout
PATCH {{host}}/api/tasks/{{id}}/validation_layout
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/vnd.cvat+json

{
  "disabled_frames": [
    4,
    5,
    8
  ]
}

## Responses
# 200
# Content-Type: application/vnd.cvat+json
